title: astragalus lambinonii
intro: Astragalus lambinonii, also known as the Lambinon's milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus lambinonii include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. Astragalus lambinonii can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
